task: Fix ST freeze on first prompt when launching 'Ollama (OpenCode)' profile in ai_terminal
resolved: Removed _settings_debug_log disk-logging calls from render_cells, _scroll_up, set_history_cap (hot paths firing every 40ms, each doing open/write/close to disk)

Cleared its stale __pycache__ entry. Canonical location is now sole copy: User/ai/ai_terminal.py (matches PluginLoader.py imports 'from User.ai.ai_terminal')
